stemHtml: Which of these correctly describes a flap/slat asymmetry protection system?

options.a: A system which detects flaps and slats position in real time and which prevents any further extension if asymmetry is detected.
options.b: Automatic compensation of the asymmetry via the yaw damper and AFCS.
options.c: A system which immediately retracts flaps/slats via spring or aerodynamics when an asymmetry is detected.
options.d: Automatic selection of full flap extension for landing upon detection of an asymmetric condition.
